holdings.name: Nvidia Corp

holdings.why_this_weight: Second largest AI infrastructure name. Conviction high but smaller than NVDA — AI ASIC thesis more concentrated.

holdings.name: Micron Technology

holdings.name: Rocket Lab USA
holdings.pattern: Base 1 — 10-week base, first base after IPO recovery
holdings.action_detail: Small cap hypergrowth — keep at 4% max (Base 1 sizing rule). Revenue acceleration QoQ confirmed. Watch $25 pivot.

holdings.why_this_weight: Hypergrowth Base 1 rule: max 4-5% until second base forms. High volatility expected.

holdings.name: Nano Nuclear Energy
holdings.pattern: Base 0 — 8-week base after strong move up, vol contraction
holdings.action_detail: Nuclear SMR theme accelerating — 3 signals GREEN this week. Hold. Do NOT add above $36 (extended). Wait for LPS.
holdings.why_bought: Nuclear narrative shift: data center power demand + energy independence. Theme RS accelerating from 55→72nd pct. Base 0 = early entry.
holdings.why_this_weight: Base 0 rule: max 3% (highest risk, earliest stage). Size up only after Base 1 forms.

holdings.name: Arista Networks
holdings.action_detail: 400G networking cycle pure-play. 800G cycle incoming 2H26. Hold — strong RS 87th pct. Stop below $328.
holdings.why_bought: AI infrastructure networking upgrade cycle — 400G→800G transition. Every hyperscaler uses Arista. Clean Stage 2 with strong RS.
holdings.why_this_weight: Strong conviction on infrastructure cycle theme. Second AI Infra position alongside AVGO — complementary (networking vs ASIC).
